Reference Log: CrashLoopBackOff: Back-off restarting failed container
Problem Analysis: Container application crashing on startup due to code errors or misconfiguration
Solution: Check container logs with kubectl logs, verify environment variables and ConfigMaps, review resource limits and probes

Reference Log: ImagePullBackOff: Failed to pull image myapp:1.0.0
Problem Analysis: Docker image not accessible or authentication required
Solution: Verify image name and tag, check imagePullSecrets for private registry, ensure network connectivity to registry

Reference Log: Pod stuck in Pending state for 5 minutes
Problem Analysis: Insufficient cluster resources or node affinity constraints
Solution: Check node capacity with kubectl describe nodes, review resource requests and limits, verify node selectors and taints

Reference Log: Service my-service has no endpoints
Problem Analysis: No pods matching service selector or pods not ready
Solution: Verify pod labels match service selector, check readiness probe configuration, ensure pods are in Running state

Reference Log: helm install failed: chart not found: myapp-1.0.0
Problem Analysis: Helm chart package missing or repository not updated
Solution: Run helm repo update, verify chart version exists, check Chart.yaml dependencies, use helm dependency update

Reference Log: UPGRADE FAILED: no ReplicaSet found for deployment
Problem Analysis: Kubernetes resources in inconsistent state during upgrade
Solution: Execute helm rollback to previous version, check deployment history, verify RBAC permissions, use helm history for debugging

Reference Log: Alert notification failed: connection refused to webhook
Problem Analysis: Alertmanager unable to reach notification webhook or email server
Solution: Verify webhook URL accessibility, check SMTP configuration, test notification channel manually, review alertmanager.yml

Reference Log: Dashboard import failed: invalid JSON format
Problem Analysis: Grafana dashboard JSON file corrupted or incompatible version
Solution: Validate JSON syntax with online tool, check Grafana version compatibility, re-export dashboard from source, fix schema version

Reference Log: Elasticsearch cluster health: RED
Problem Analysis: Primary shards unallocated causing data loss or corruption
Solution: Check elasticsearch logs for errors, verify disk space availability, review shard allocation settings, restart failed nodes

Reference Log: Consumer group lag exceeded threshold: 10000 messages
Problem Analysis: Message consumer processing slower than producer rate
Solution: Scale consumer instances, optimize message processing logic, check consumer group membership, review Kafka broker health

Reference Log: Too many clients connected to PostgreSQL database
Problem Analysis: Database connection pool fully utilized causing new connections to fail
Solution: Increase max_connections parameter, implement connection pooling with PgBouncer, identify and close idle connections, add monitoring alerts

Reference Log: MongoDB replica set secondary lagging by 300 seconds
Problem Analysis: Secondary node unable to keep up with primary writes
Solution: Check network latency between nodes, verify secondary node resources, review oplog size, optimize write operations

Reference Log: RabbitMQ queue memory usage above high watermark
Problem Analysis: Queue accumulating messages faster than consumption
Solution: Implement message TTL, add dead letter exchange, scale consumers, review prefetch count settings, enable lazy queues

Reference Log: Ingress controller returning 502 Bad Gateway
Problem Analysis: Backend service unavailable or health check failing
Solution: Verify backend pods are running, check service port configuration, review ingress annotations, test backend directly

Reference Log: Sidecar injector mutating webhook timeout
Problem Analysis: Istio sidecar proxy not injected into pod automatically
Solution: Check istiod deployment status, verify namespace istio-injection label, reviewMutatingWebhookConfiguration, increase timeout if needed

Reference Log: Certificate renewal failed: ACME challenge unsuccessful
Problem Analysis: Let's Encrypt HTTP-01 or DNS-01 challenge validation failed
Solution: Verify domain DNS records, check ingress gateway routing, ensure cert-manager can reach .well-known path, review issuer configuration

Reference Log: Vault secret rotation timed out after 60 seconds
Problem Analysis: Vault unable to rotate database credentials within timeout window
Solution: Increase lease renewal timeout, check vault performance, verify database user permissions, review rotation interval settings

Reference Log: Consul agent unable to register service with catalog
Problem Analysis: Consul agent misconfigured or catalog service unavailable
Solution: Verify consul agent configuration, check ACL token permissions, ensure gossip protocol ports open, restart consul agent

Reference Log: Terraform apply failed: state lock timeout exceeded
Problem Analysis: Another terraform process holding state lock preventing changes
Solution: Run terraform force-unlock with lock ID, check state backend (S3/Azure Blob), ensure no concurrent runs, implement CI/CD serialization

Reference Log: Ansible playbook failed at task: Install required packages
Problem Analysis: Package installation failed on remote hosts due to repository issues
Solution: Verify yum/apt repository configuration, check network connectivity to package mirrors, review ansible inventory, increase timeout for slow networks
